matchingLocations.title: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening

preview.canonicalTitle: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
preview.canonicalBody:
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-cross-viewport-ui-reliability`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `reliability`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `84%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-16T13:18:58.761Z`

## Summary
Coordinate mobile safe-area, overlay containment, browser layout, and touch-control behavior through one viewport contract and physical-device proof path.

## Objective
- Keep every Mazer surface contained and usable across desktop, narrow browser, phone browser, and installed PWA while preserving one dete... [see journal/source]

## Acceptance criteria
- Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
- Mobile and browser layout work can be verified independently and together through a shared matrix.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Discoveries
- The exact production UI packet is clean at 390x844 DPR 2 after excluding an unrelated known topology assertion for seed 3749.
- 2 more item(s) in journal/source

## Next actions
- Verify Player Guide left-edge containment on the production build using the operator's physical iPhone.
- Verify one-tile wall fallback, dominant-lane T-junction steering, blocked-hold recovery, and sliding-arrow capture on the physical iPhone.
- Keep installed-PWA banding and native browser-chrome/maximize proof open.

## Blockers
- Physical iPhone post-release feel and containment verification is pending.

## Evidence
- Mazer PR #77 merged at 8ea4eed42024914397573af83a63d8ee79c5ced1.
- 4 more item(s) in journal/source
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->
preview.journalBody:
ATLAS-JOURNAL-EVENT-ID: `mazer-cross-viewport-prod-release-20260716`
- card: `mazer-cross-viewport-ui-reliability`
- idempotency: `mazer-cross-viewport-prod-release-20260716`
## Merged control repair is live in Mazer production
- kind: `review`
- state: `review`
- actor: `Mazer`
- occurred: `2026-07-16T13:18:58.761Z`

## Completed
- Merged Mazer PR #77 into main through merge commit 8ea4eed42024914397573af83a63d8ee79c5ced1.
- Deployed that exact clean merge to the existing Mazer production project.
- Verified the production alias and release bundle over HTTP.
- Passed the complete authenticated phone-sized UI surface packet against production.

## Discovered
- The first broad capture was red only on the unrelated topology diagnostic for seed 3749; the admitted UI/control release scope passed when that separate assertion was explicitly excluded.
- Physical-device feel remains an acceptance surface that automation cannot claim complete.

## Next
- Collect the operator's physical-iPhone screenshots and control-feel result against production.
- Complete the card only if the physical-device acceptance criteria pass; otherwise journal the exact residual and continue the same card.

## Blockers
- Physical iPhone post-release verification remains pending.

## Evidence
- https://github.com/fawxzzy/mazer/pull/77
- https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app
- Vercel deployment dpl_3PGem7fCME4mAkUdM4h98MQefet3
- Mazer merge commit 8ea4eed42024914397573af83a63d8ee79c5ced1
- repos/mazer/docs/ops/MAZER-MOBILE-CONTROL-INTENT-REWORK-2026-07-16.md

## Correlation
- task: `019f52d9-7667-72a3-a5f7-9c0613aedd8f`
- branch: `main`
- commit: `8ea4eed42024914397573af83a63d8ee79c5ced1`
